**Operators** are software extensions to: **Operators** are software extensions to OpenShift that make use of custom resources to manage applications and their components. They are managed by Operator Lifecycle Manager.

Enable the OLMv1 catalog experience. OLM: Enable the OLMv1 catalog experience. OLMv1 is a technology preview feature that provides an updated operator catalog interface.
Lets you use OLMv1 (Tech Preview), a str: Lets you use OLMv1 (Tech Preview), a streamlined redesign of OLMv0. OLMv1 simplifies operator management with declarative APIs, enhanced security, and direct, GitOps-friendly control over upgrades.

Namespace for the operator controller, m: Namespace for the operator controller, manifest, etc. A dedicated operator namespace is recommended.
Package will only be resolved from speci: Package will only be resolved from specified catalogs.
Service account must be in the selected: Service account must be in the selected namespace. A dedicated service account for the operator is recommended.
With OLMv1, you'll get a much simpler AP: With OLMv1, you'll get a much simpler API that's easier to work with and understand. Plus, you have more direct control over updates. You can define update ranges and decide exactly how they are rolled out.
